programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A beloved Oklahoma father is discovered murdered inside his home and the search for his killer uncovers a forbidden romance and a deadly double-cross.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A young couple becomes the target of a nationwide manhunt after police connect the deadly lovers to two grisly murders in different states.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A horrific killing spree leads Pennsylvania investigators on the hunt for two young lovers willing to do whatever it takes to evade the law.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: The sudden disappearance of a wealthy couple rattles their small town and launches an investigation that exposes a web of deception, greed and a blood-soaked betrayal.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a wealthy couple falls victim to a deadly home invasion, the search for the killers exposes both a twisted relationship and a family betrayal no one saw coming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Chandra Levy: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: In 2001, intern Chandra Levy disappears from Washington, D.C., then rumors surface of an affair between the beautiful intern and a married congressman; one year later, Levy's body is found in Rock Creek Park, and her murder goes unsolved to this day.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When Wendy Ratte, a free-spirited mother of two, goes missing, police go under cover to crack the case.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When Wendy Ratte, a free-spirited mother of two, goes missing, police go under cover to crack the case.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When a San Diego woman who is near death arrives at an emergency room, the FBI and local law enforcement are called in to try to solve a medical mystery and a horrific crime.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman and mother of three is found shot in her office; the investigation into her death leaves a family divided.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Two decades after a Jacksonville, Fla., woman goes missing, her son solves the mystery that haunted his childhood.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion; her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night; investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: When Cathy Torrez never comes home after work, her family fears the worst; an intensive search ends after her car is found, with her body in the trunk; it take years to get to the truth.

programme.title: Prosecuting Evil With Kelly Siegler
programme.desc: When former NFL star Antonio Armstrong and his wife, Dawn, are murdered in their own bed, detectives uncover a stray bullet, threatening note and web of complicated family dynamics that ultimately unravel, revealing a dark betrayal.

programme.title: Prosecuting Evil With Kelly Siegler
programme.desc: A paroled killer linked to the disappearance of young women forces police into a desperate manhunt; this shocking case unfolds against a backdrop of unfortunate legal and parole decisions that set Kenneth McDuff loose to become a serial killer.

programme.title: Prosecuting Evil With Kelly Siegler
programme.desc: The ambush-style murder of a human rights activist confuses investigators; but when her boyfriend's brother is also gunned down, police uncover a plan to commit murders in the name of honor.

programme.title: The Death Investigator With Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in an elevator, but her murder is just the beginning; as Barbara Butcher retraces the chain of evidence, she uncovers a domino effect of violence that leaves a trail of bodies across the Bronx.

programme.title: The Death Investigator With Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: When an unknown body surfaces in the icy East River, Barbara Butcher joins detectives in a race to reconstruct the victim's identity using the few fragile clues left behind; pressure mounts when a report comes in that there may be more victims.

programme.title: The Death Investigator With Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: In 2012, a tight-knit Las Vegas neighborhood is shattered by the murder of a mother and daughter in their home; investigators must analyze a crime scene soaked in rage to help stop a killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a Philly radio personality is killed in her lavish Shore home, the years-long investigation reveals an undercover informant, an intricate murder-for-hire plot, and a vast trafficking conspiracy.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: After a successful Korean-American business owner is killed during a home invasion, detectives believe his murder could be tied to a string of Philly crimes against businesses, until they uncover that the mastermind is someone much closer to home.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: After a talented artist and musician goes missing, the investigation into his disappearance leads to a gruesome discovery in a historic Philly cemetery, revealing a sinister series of events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: A beloved Staten Island teacher is found dead in the home she shared with her husband; an unknown number in her cell phone leads investigators to ultimately unearth her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: When a young pregnant mother goes missing in Virginia, her family embarks on a search, but the case goes cold; years later, investigators find a woman who may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: After a talented artist and musician goes missing, the investigation into his disappearance leads to a gruesome discovery in a historic Philly cemetery, revealing a sinister series of events.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Mama Edna, a pillar of the Haitian community in Brooklyn is adored by all as the matriarch of East Flatbush; when she is found murdered in her home, NYPD uncover a Voodoo practice that leads them to a web of the unthinkable.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When an aspiring writer and painter in the vibrant Soho art scene of the early '80s is found murdered just two days after her debut book is published, her devastated husband offers a critical clue.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A single mother who is pregnant with her second child says goodnight to her 12-year-old daughter in their Brooklyn home at midnight; by morning, she is found dead miles away in the Hudson River of midtown Manhattan.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A 21-year-old college senior is shot and killed in a public park just months before her graduation.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Randy Baker finds his calling as a counselor then winds up dead.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Pamela Smart's husband is found murdered; police investigate and discover that Smart is keeping a big secret.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: After two best friends are reported missing, Texas and Minnesota police team up to bring a suspected serial killer to justice; an accomplice shares her side of the story from behind bars, revealing chilling details of the crime.

programme.desc: A North Dakota community is rocked after a beloved mother is found stabbed to death in her home.As police look to those closest to her for answers, an informant comes forward and exposes a dangerous couple's vengeful plot.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When authorities respond to a car fire in rural Michigan, they find a charred body discarded nearby; as the investigation unfolds, the victim's phone records point to a vicious plot stemming from a dangerous infatuation.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: Just months before his retirement, a missing trucker's body is found in a remote creek; as detectives run out of leads, a seemingly minute detail breathes new life into the investigation revealing two lovers with a nefarious plot.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When an esteemed California pastor is found executed in an almond orchard, investigators turn to his complex love life for answers; allegations of blackmail are exposed, and a vindictive conspiracy is ultimately brought to light.

programme.desc: When a crimespree leaves five dead, South Carolina authorities kickstart a multi-state investigation to capture a desperate couple on the run; the case grows more complicated whenpolice are faced with conflicting accounts of the murders.

programme.desc: After a young mother is murdered in broad daylight, Texas authorities are on a hunt for a masked gunman; the ensuing investigation uncovers a bitter custody battle and a vicious plot born of obsession.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A welfare check confirms the worst when a woman is found brutally murdered on her couch; the ensuing investigation leads authorities from Oklahoma to Arkansas where conflicting stories of a crime motivated by greed and jealousy are uncovered.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a missing man's bullet-riddled body is found off the side of a road, police must dig into his complicated past to uncover the truth; the case hits a standstill until information about the victim's car comes to light and reveals a toxic romance.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a shocking crime is committed in broad daylight that leaves a young man dead on the street, the investigation uncovers a personal vendetta; in exclusive prison interviews, the killer couple each share their version of events.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a young soldier goes missing just two days after his wedding, authorities fear the worst has occurred in their small Ohio town. Rumors of a sordid affair lead to a shocking betrayal that ended in not one, but two horrific crimes.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: A botched bank robbery and bomb-clad hostage lead Erie detectives through a bizarre, convoluted scavenger hunt that starts with a pizza delivery, ends with multiple victims, and was concocted by a deranged perpetrator who has plans to kill again.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The death of a police officer leads to a search for her killer; her shooting may be payback for an old arrest, or may be closer to home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a young soldier goes missing just two days after his wedding, authorities fear the worst has occurred in their small Ohio town. Rumors of a sordid affair lead to a shocking betrayal that ended in not one, but two horrific crimes.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars
programme.desc: In a jailhouse interview, Traci Wolfe reveals the catalyst that sparked an uncontrollable rage and ended in her husband's gruesome death; holding nothing back, she now reflects on the crime that landed her in prison for life.
